title: Movement pricing, combos, and import fixes
items: Movement catalogue: show cost and RRP side-by-side when choosing movements
New RRP formula for all movements: max($80 floor, cost × 2.75)
New repair services: Bracelet resize ($20), Spring bar ($9.95), Back gasket ($14.95), Case polishing Light/Full ($60/$110), Full Service — quoted
Combo pricing: Battery + Pressure Test $49.95 total; Battery + Band 20% off the band
Quoted services (e.g. Full Service) force job to Awaiting quote for workshop review before sending
Lazy-load movement list so job pages load faster
Faster auth redirect: 5s max wait on refresh, redirect to landing page
Excel import: fixed row/header mismatch, Excel date serials, cost overflow clamp, clearer errors
Import: ticket/job number now preserved from source (e.g. Ticket #, Ref, Job No) instead of auto-assigning; strips Excel .0 suffix
Import: handles varied spreadsheet layouts — unnamed first column as ticket, Number→phone, GA/NG/Collected→status, being done→notes
Shoe repairs: repair complexity (Simple/Standard/Complex) and estimated turnaround per service; displayed when quoting and on job cards
Shoe repairs: queue-based Est. ready by date — derives from quantity of jobs ahead (FIFO) and each job's repair time

title: Improvements and new features
items: Proactive token refresh so you stay signed in longer
Remember this device option on login (session-only when unchecked)
Plan usage and limits shown on Team Accounts; upgrade CTA when at limit
Audit log restricted to owners and managers
Request ID on API responses for support and debugging
Stricter password policy options (configurable)
Export and data portability (CSV and export my data)
Dashboard widgets: overdue jobs, quotes pending, overdue invoices
Customer self-service portal link
Error tracking (Sentry) and nightly backup check script

title: Initial release
items: Watch, shoe, and auto-key repair job tracking
Quotes and customer approval flow
Invoicing and manual payment capture
Multi-tenant team accounts and plans
Reports and analytics
B2B customer accounts and statements
